since_last: 62% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.56%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.73% · Gold -2.21% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 62% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.56%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.56%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.60%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +9.36%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +9.36%, MRVL +5.95%, KLAC +4.97%, LRCX +4.91%, AMAT +4.90%. Laggards: IBM -5.22%, SPCX -1.73%, INTU -1.45%, WDAY -1.42%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.73% at $188.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.73% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
